Description: Unsecured formwork prop fell 2 storeys through slab penetration opening. No persons in exclusion zone below at the time. Prop landed on Level 16 concrete slab.
Immediate Action: Area barricaded. All formwork crews stood down for remainder of shift. Penetration openings on active levels covered with rated grating.
Root Cause: Penetration covers removed by services crew for conduit install and not replaced. No permit-to-remove system in place for temporary edge protection and covers.
Corrective Action: 1. Implement penetration cover removal permit system. 2. Colour-coded covers — red covers require permit to remove. 3. Toolbox talk all trades on penetration cover policy. 4. Daily checklist added to foreman inspection for cover integrity.

Description: Worker sustained laceration to left forearm when carrying plasterboard sheet through loading dock door. Sheet caught on exposed bolt thread from removed door hardware, causing 8cm cut.
Immediate Action: First aid administered on site. Wound cleaned and dressed with steri-strips. Worker assessed by site first aider — no sutures required. Completed incident report and returned to light duties.
Root Cause: Exposed bolt threads from removed door hardware not capped or removed. Area not identified in hazard inspection.
Corrective Action: 1. All exposed bolt threads in loading dock capped with safety caps. 2. Loading dock added to weekly hazard inspection route. 3. Subcontractors briefed that removed hardware must be fully extracted or capped same day.
